halibut-with-clementine-gremolata.name: Halibut With Clementine Gremolata
instructions: Using vegetable peeler, remove peel (orange part only) of clementines. Chop peel (reserve flesh for another use). Combine chopped clementine peel, chopped parsley, minced garlic, and sea salt in small bowl. Stir in extra-virgin olive oil and set gremolata aside. DO AHEAD Gremolata can be prepared 4 hours ahead. Cover and refrigerate.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Using vegetable peeler, remove peel of clementine in four 2-inch-long strips (orange part only). Cut four 12-inch squares parchment paper. Place halibut fillet in center of each parchment paper square. Sprinkle with salt and freshly ground black pepper. Drizzle halibut lightly with olive oil. Place 1 clementine peel strip, cut side up, on each halibut fillet. Bring 2 edges of parchment paper together along long side of fish fillet and fold parchment edges together 3 to 4 times. Tuck both remaining edges of parchment underneath fillet to create packet and place parchment packet on rimmed baking sheet. Repeat with remaining fish fillets. DO AHEAD Halibut packets can be made 4 hours ahead. Chill on rimmed baking sheet.

Bake fish just until opaque in center, about 18 minutes (to check doneness, unwrap packet and insert fork in fillet). Remove rimmed baking sheet from oven. Unwrap fish. Place halibut fillets on plates, spoon gremolata over, and serve.

halloumi-no-meat-balls.name: Halloumi No-meat Balls

ingredients.item: Mild red pepper flakes or  0.25 tsp. crushed red pepper flakes
Cilantro leaves with tender stems and country-style bread or steamed rice

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 400°. Mix 1 small onion, coarsely grated, 2 large eggs, lightly beaten to blend, ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil, and ¼ cup water in a medium bowl to combine, then mix in 1½ cups panko and let sit 10 minutes to hydrate.

Mix in one 8-oz. block Halloumi cheese, coarsely grated, 1 tsp. garlic powder, 1 tsp. smoked paprika, and ½ tsp. mild red pepper flakes or ¼ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes; season with freshly ground black pepper. (You don’t need salt as the Halloumi tends to be very salty.) Working one at a time, scoop out 3-Tbsp. portions and gently roll between lightly oiled hands to form into balls (you should have about 12 total).

Arrange no-meat balls on a large rimmed baking sheet, spacing evenly apart; drizzle each with a little oil. Bake until well browned underneath and lightly golden on top, 18–22 minutes. Let cool slightly.

While the no-meat balls are baking, heat 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large saucepan or medium skillet over medium. Add two 3" cinnamon sticks and 4 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, and cook, stirring often, until garlic is golden around the edges, about 4 minutes.

Add one 24-oz. bottle passata and season with kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper. Cook, reducing heat as needed if sauce is spattering, until reduced by one third and flavors have come together, 20–25 minutes. (It’s important to cook out the raw flavor of the tomato first; you’ll adjust for consistency after.) Stir in ¼-cupfuls of water at a time until you can pour sauce off of a spoon in a smooth, steady stream. Combine meatballs and sauce in a large shallow bowl and top with cilantro leaves with tender stems. Serve with country-style bread or steamed rice alongside.
Do Ahead: No-meat balls and sauce can be made 3 days ahead. Store together or separately in airtight containers and chill.

hanger-steak-with-orange-oregano-chimich.name: Hanger Steak With Orange-oregano Chimichurri

ingredients.prep: center membrane removed, cut into 4 pieces

instructions: Remove steaks from the refrigerator 30 minutes before cooking.

Combine garlic, oregano, and orange zest in a medium bowl; using the back of a spoon, crush with ¾ tsp. salt until fragrant. Mix in parsley, orange juice, and vinegar. Slowly whisk in ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil until emulsified; season chimichurri with salt and pepper.

Season steaks all over with salt and pepper. Heat remaining 2 tsp. olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add steaks and cook, turning once, until browned and medium-rare, 4–6 minutes per side. Let rest at least 10 minutes before slicing against the grain. Reserve 4 oz. steak for Steak and Arugula Salad.
Serve steaks with chimichurri.

healthier-buffalo-chicken-dip.name: Healthier Buffalo Chicken Dip

ingredients.prep: cleaned and cut into 4 inch pieces

instructions: Heat chicken and hot sauce in a skillet over medium heat until heated through, about 5 minutes. Stir in cream cheese and ranch dressing; cook and stir until well blended and warm, 5 to 7 minutes.
Mix in 1/2 of the Cheddar.
Transfer mixture to a slow cooker. Sprinkle remaining Cheddar over top. Cover and cook on Low until hot and bubbly, about 30 minutes.
Serve with celery sticks and crackers.

healthier-carrot-oatmeal-cookies.name: Healthier Carrot Oatmeal Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line 2 cookie sheets with parchment paper.
Beat honey and coconut oil in a large bowl with an electric mixer until creamy; beat in carrots and eggs until combined.
Sift flour, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, baking soda, and salt together in a large bowl; stir into carrot mixture until well combined. Stir in oats, raisins, and walnuts until evenly combined.
Drop large spoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto the prepared cookie sheets; flatten with a fork, if desired.
Bake in the preheated oven until tops are golden, about 15 minutes. Cool on the cookie sheet for 1 minute before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.

healthier-slow-cooker-chicken-taco-soup.name: Healthier Slow Cooker Chicken Taco Soup
instructions: Combine diced tomatoes, chili beans, black beans, corn, beer, and tomato sauce in a slow cooker. Stir in onion, carrot, and taco seasoning until blended. Place chicken breasts on top of the mixture, pressing down on each one to slightly submerge. Cover and cook on Low for 5 hours.
Remove chicken breasts from the slow cooker and set on a cutting board to cool slightly, about 10 minutes. Shred meat and return to the slow cooker. Cover and cook on Low for 2 more hours.
Ladle soup into bowls and garnish with Cheddar cheese, cilantro, sour cream, and crushed tortilla chips.

healthy-oatmeal-and-chocolate-cookies-re.name: Healthy Oatmeal And Chocolate Cookies Recipe
healthy-oatmeal-and-chocolate-cookies-re.original_name: Receta de galletas de avena y chocolate saludables
instructions: Preheat the oven at 180 been 3 been
In a bowl put the bananas and make them purée
Bat slightly with an egg with a fork and incorpate with the banana purée
Agrega la avena y mezcla bien
Add cinnamon, vanilla and cocoa powder
When you have your mix add some cranberries and nuts to your taste
En una bandeja coloca papel para hornear y forma las galletas
Hornea de 15 a 20 minutos y listo
Disfruta

heart-biscuits-lezzet.name: Heart Biscuits

ingredients.item: 60 gr white chocolate160 gr dark chocolate

instructions: 1. Mix flour, cocoa, baking powder and salt from one rough.
2. Add brunette sugar and powder sugar stirring.
3. Add butter, eggs and vanilla to the mixture and cook with the mixer.
4. Reject Bitter chocolate and white chocolate.
5. Add to the flour mixture and knead for 10 minutes.
6. Open half-century thickness with dough roller.
7. Cut the dough you open with a heart-shaped mold.
8. Directory of biscuits to a lightly lubricated tray.
9. Cook for 20 minutes in the oven, which is pre-heated to 150 degrees.
10. Serve powdery veterans warm.

hearty-barley-turkey-soup.name: Hearty Barley Turkey Soup
instructions: Gather all stock and soup ingredients.

To make the turkey stock: Combine 5 quarts water and turkey carcass in a large stockpot over medium-high heat; bring to a boil. Add onion, carrot, celery, peppercorns, bay leaf, and thyme. Reduce the heat and simmer, skimming excess fat and foam from the surface as needed and adding more water as it evaporates, for 2 to 2 ½ hours.
Remove carcass to a cutting board and cool. Strain stock; discard solids and return liquid to the pot.
Pull meat from cooled carcass and discard bones. Shred meat and refrigerate until needed.

Make the soup: Add carrots, onions, celery, barley, mushrooms, bay leaves, salt, marjoram, pepper, and thyme to stock; bring to a boil. Reduce the heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until barley is fully cooked, about 1 hour 20 minutes.
Return shredded turkey to the soup; simmer until heated through, about 10 minutes. Remove bay leaves and serve.

heavenly-delicacy-teleculinaria.name: Heavenly Delicacy
instructions: Light a pot with sugar and water and let it boil until you get yarn point (105°C with the kitchen thermometer).
Add the cheeses, previously undone, and remove from the fire as soon as it starts boiling. Let it cool down a bit, add the yolks and take it back to the fire, stirring all the time, until they boil.
Lay the candy in a refractory bowl and put it in the oven, preheated at 200°C, until the surface gratin. Remove, let it cool and store in the refrigerator until serving.

heirloom-tomato-pico-de-gallo.name: Heirloom Tomato Pico De Gallo

ingredients.item: Chili pepper seeds removed and minced

instructions: Combine all of the ingredients in a bowl.
Allow to sit for 30 minutes so flavors combine and serve as a dip with tortilla chips or on top of grilled chicken or fish.

herbed-egg-salad.name: Herbed Egg Salad
instructions: Mix eggs, chives, mayonnaise, dill, mustard, 1½ tsp. vinegar, and a few dashes of hot sauce in a medium bowl until well combined. Season with salt, pepper, and more hot sauce or vinegar, if desired.

herby-napa-cabbage-salad-with-lime.name: Herby Napa Cabbage Salad With Lime
instructions: Quarter cabbage lengthwise, then slice each quarter crosswise into 1" pieces (you should have about 10 cups). Transfer to a large bowl. Trim off bottom 3" of cilantro and pluck out any bad-looking stems; transfer to bowl with cabbage. Pick tender sprigs from dill and add to bowl; discard tough stems. (You should end up with about 3 cups picked herbs total.) Toss cabbage, cilantro, and dill to combine.
Finely grate lime zest into a liquid measuring cup. Halve limes and squeeze juice over, then add vinegar; season with salt and pepper.
Toss salad with lime-vinegar mixture, then add oil and toss again. Season with salt, if needed, and serve immediately.

hidden-veggie-chicken-rice.name: Hidden Veggie Chicken & Rice
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400˚F (200˚C).
Season the chicken thighs in a bowl with the salt, pepper, ½ teaspoon garlic powder, the paprika, dried basil, and dried oregano. Mix until thoroughly coated with the seasoning.

Heat the olive oil in a ovenproof pot over high heat. Place the chicken thighs, skin-side down, in the hot oil. Cook for 3-4 minutes, or until the thighs develop brown crispy skin, then flip over. Cook for another 2-3 minutes to brown the other side, then remove from the pot.
Grate the zucchinis on the large holes of a box grater.
Add the grated zucchini to the pot used to cook the chicken, along with rice, remaining ½ teaspoon of garlic powder, salt and pepper to taste, and the chicken broth. Bring to a boil.
Lay the chicken on top of the rice mixture and cover the pot. Transfer to the oven and bake for 30 minutes, or until the internal temperature of the chicken reaches 165˚F (75˚C).
Remove the lid and broil for 1-2 minutes to crisp the chicken skin even more, if desired.
Serve the chicken atop the rice.
Enjoy!

ho-ho-bumpy-cake.name: Ho Ho Bumpy Cake
instructions: Combine cake mix, water, eggs, and oil in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer on low speed until moistened. Increase speed to medium and beat for 2 minutes.
Pour batter into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 24 to 29 minutes. Let cool completely, at least 45 minutes.
Combine sugar, shortening, evaporated milk, butter, vanilla extract, and salt in a bowl. Beat with a hand mixer until light and fluffy, 10 to 15 minutes.
Pipe cream frosting in lines over the cooled cake.

Place chocolate frosting in a microwave-safe bowl. Warm in the microwave for 1 minute, checking after 30 seconds. Drizzle melted frosting over the cream with a spoon. Refrigerate until set, about 1 hour.

honey-walnut-cream-cheese.name: Honey Walnut Cream Cheese
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Place walnuts on a baking sheet. Bake until toasted and fragrant, about 10 minutes. Transfer walnuts to a plate to cool. When walnuts are cool, transfer to a resealable plastic bag and crush with a rolling pin.
Combine cream cheese, honey, and walnuts in a food processor and pulse until creamy.

honey-glazed-fried-chicken.name: Honey-glazed Fried Chicken
instructions: In a large glass bowl, combine water, vinegar, and salt, mixing until some salt is dissolved. Add chicken, cover, and refrigerate for 2-8 hours.
In a medium bowl, combine eggs, milk, and hot sauce to create the egg wash.
Add flour to bowl and set aside.
Remove chicken from brine, place in bowl and season.
Transfer chicken to egg wash then the flour, coating evenly.
Fry chicken in a large cast-iron pan for 10-15 minutes on each side.
Place chicken on drying rack and let cool for 5 minutes.
Mix honey and water together and lightly brush each piece of chicken.
Enjoy!

honey-marinated-pork-with-gremolata.name: Honey-marinated Pork With Gremolata
instructions: Place pork in 11x7x2-inch glass baking dish. Whisk honey, garlic, and orange juice in small bowl. Pour over pork; turn to coat. Sprinkle pork with 1 teaspoon sea salt and 1/2 teaspoon freshly ground black pepper. Cover and chill at least 2 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

Preheat oven to 191°C. Transfer pork to plate; reserve marinade. Heat oil in large ovenproof skillet over medium-high heat. Add pork to skillet. Brown on all sides, turning often, about 4 minutes. Transfer to oven; cook until instant-read thermometer inserted into center of pork registers 66°C, 15 to 20 minutes. Transfer to cutting board; let rest 5 minutes. Reserve skillet.
Pour reserved marinade into same skillet; add wine. Boil gently until reduced to 1/2 cup, 3 to 4 minutes. Season with sea salt and pepper.
Mix orange peel, thyme, rosemary, and sage in small bowl for gremolata. Cut pork crosswise into 1/2-inch-thick slices; transfer to platter. Pour sauce over pork. Sprinkle with gremolata and serve.

hong-kong-style-crispy-rice-skillet.name: Hong Kong-style Crispy Rice Skillet

ingredients.prep: plus more for soaking the rice

ingredients.item: . (1 to 2 links) chinese cured pork sausage
. (1 to 2 links) chinese cured duck liver sausage

instructions: Place the rice in a medium bowl, cover with 2 inches of water, and soak for 1 hour.

Drain the rice, then transfer to a 10-inch cast-iron or nonstick skillet. Stir in the 1⅔ cups water, 3 teaspoons of the neutral oil, and the salt. Gently shake the pan to even out the rice. Scatter the sliced sausages and pork belly on top.

Bring the rice and water to a simmer over medium-high heat. When the mixture begins to slowly bubble, cover with a tight-fitting lid, reduce the heat to medium-low, and cook for 15 to 17 minutes, until the rice is tender.

Remove the lid from the skillet and increase the heat to medium. Drizzle the remaining 2 teaspoons neutral oil around the perimeter of the pan. You should hear the rice sizzling and crackling; if not, increase the heat to medium-high. Cook, uncovered, for an additional 7 to 10 minutes to crisp the bottom of the rice. Use a thin spatula to check the bottom periodically, and rotate the pan a few times to ensure the rice is cooking evenly.

Make the sauce: In a small saucepan, combine the sugar, water, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, sesame oil, and white pepper. Bring to a simmer over medium heat and stir to dissolve the sugar. When the sugar is dissolved, turn off the heat. When the bottom of the rice is golden brown, drizzle half the sauce over the dish. Serve with the remaining sauce on the side.

horchata.name: Horchata

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract
Ground cinnamon; plus more for serving

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Spread out ½ cup raw almonds on a small rimmed baking sheet and toast, stirring occasionally, until slightly darkened in color and fragrant, 8–10 minutes. Let cool.

Place almonds and  1 cup jasmine rice, rinsed once or twice, in a medium bowl and pour in 5 cups room-temperature water to cover. Let soak at least 3 hours and up to 1 day (if soaking for longer than 6 hours, cover and chill).

Transfer rice, almonds, and soaking liquid to a blender and add one 14-oz. can sweetened condensed milk, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 2 tsp. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract, and ½ tsp. ground cinnamon. Blend on high until very smooth, about 5 minutes.
Strain mixture through a nut milk bag or fine-mesh sieve lined with a layer of cheesecloth into a 2-qt. jar or a pitcher, pressing on solids to extract as much liquid as possible.

Pour horchata into ice-filled glasses. Garnish each with a pinch of cinnamon if desired.
Do ahead: Horchata can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill. Shake well before serving.

hot-buttered-rum-sauce.name: Hot Buttered Rum Sauce
instructions: Melt butter in a heavy saucepan over medium heat; add brown sugar, cream, and corn syrup. Bring to a boil; cook and stir until sugar dissolves, about 1 minute. Remove saucepan from heat and stir in rum extract. Cool slightly before serving.

hot-dogs-with-dal-and-red-onion-raita.name: Hot Dogs With Dal And Red-onion Raita

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: cut into 4 wedges, then crosswise into paper-thin slices

ingredients.item: Minced seeded red jalapeño or serrano chile
Fresh lemon juice or lime juice
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Rinse lentils; place in a medium saucepan. Add cumin, turmeric, and 2½ cups water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low; cover and cook until lentils are tender, about 35 minutes. Drain, reserving cooking liquid. Mash lentils in pan to a coarse sauce, adding reserved cooking liquid by tablespoonfuls if very thick. Season with salt and pepper.
Mix onion, mint, jalapeño, and lemon juice in a medium bowl. Fold in yogurt. Season raita with salt and pepper. Let stand 30 minutes.
Arrange buns on plates. Top each with grilled hot dog, dal, and raita. Serve with lemon wedges.

hot-honey-pizza-onion-chips.name: Hot Honey Pizza Onion Chips
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C).
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or a nonstick silicone baking mat.

Spread 1½ cups of the Parmesan evenly over the prepared baking sheet in a thin, uniform layer. Top evenly with the onion slices. Brush the tops with oil, and sprinkle with the Italian seasoning and paprika. Top evenly with the pepperoni and the remaining 3 tablespoons Parmesan.
Bake for 12–15 minutes, until the cheese is golden and crispy. Remove from the oven. Let cool on the baking sheet for 2–3 minutes.
Remove the onion chips from the baking sheet, and drizzle with the hot honey. Serve immediately with warm marinara sauce for dipping.
Enjoy!

hot-smoked-salmon-with-tarragon-creme-fr.name: Hot-smoked Salmon With Tarragon Crème Fraîche

ingredients.prep: capers, sliced avocados, sliced cucumbers, watercress, and sliced scallions (for serving)
14" circular wire rack, mesquite or hickory wood chips, three 6" bamboo skewers

instructions: Pat salmon dry, then generously coat skin and wire rack with nonstick spray. Place salmon, skin side down, on rack and set inside a rimmed baking sheet; season salmon flesh well with salt. Chill, uncovered, 3 hours.
Whisk shallot, crème fraîche, tarragon, and lemon zest in a small bowl to combine; taste and season with salt. Cover and chill.

Crumple 2 large sheets of heavy-duty foil to form two 4"-diameter balls. Heat skillet over medium-high, 6 minutes. Spread 2 cups wood chips in center of skillet and let char until partially blackened and smoking, about 5 minutes. Sprinkle coriander seeds, peppercorns, dill seeds, and celery seeds over chips. Carefully set rack with salmon in skillet over chips. Set foil balls on either side of fillet and push 3 skewers vertically into fillet along the bloodline about 1" deep and 3" apart. Loosely cover skillet with foil, using foil balls and skewers as support so there is space for smoke to circulate around the fish.

Reduce heat to medium and smoke salmon 8 minutes, then reduce heat to lowest setting and cook until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of fillet registers 120°, 10–15 minutes. Transfer rack with salmon back to baking sheet and let cool 30 minutes.
Serve salmon at room temperature with tarragon crème fraîche, bagels, capers, avocados, cucumbers, watercress, and scallions alongside.

hound-dog-cocktail.name: Hound Dog Cocktail
instructions: Using the tip of a paring knife, score an X in the bottom of peach. Cook in a small saucepan of boiling water just until skin begins to peel back where cut, about 30 seconds. Transfer to a bowl of ice water; let cool.
Peel peach, remove pit, and coarsely chop. Purée peach with 3 Tbsp. water in a blender until smooth. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve; discard solids (you should have about 4 oz.).
Combine sugar, ginger, and ¼ cup hot water in a jar, cover, and shake vigorously until sugar is dissolved. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a small jar and chill.

For each cocktail, combine 1½ oz. bourbon, 1 oz. peach purée, ½ oz. ginger syrup, and ½ oz. lemon juice in a cocktail shaker. Fill with ice, cover, and shake vigorously until outside of shaker is frosty, about 20 seconds. Strain into a rocks glass filled with ice. Garnish with a mint sprig and peach wedge.

how-to-make-a-delicious-pineapple-cake-c.name: How To Make A Delicious Pineapple Cake
how-to-make-a-delicious-pineapple-cake-c.original_name: Cómo hacer una delicioso bizcocho de piña

ingredients.item: 1 can of pineapple cuts in its juice

instructions: It purifies the oven to 180 been 3 been (177 been 3 been) and grease a cake mold with butter or spray oil.

Prepare caramel: in a small frying pan with medium heat, mix sugar and water. Cooking till the sugar dissolve and get a golden color. Gather the caramel quickly at the bottom of the cake mold, making sure to cover the bottom uniformly.
Drain pineapple slices and reserve the juice. Put pineapple cuts onto the caramel at the bottom of the mold, creating a decorative cape. You can use as many cuts as you wish.
In a big bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder and salt.
In another bowl, beat the eggs slightly and then add melted butter, milk, vanilla extract and 1 / 2 cup of pineapple juice. Mix well all the liquid ingredients.
Add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients and stir up to a homogenous mass. Avoid excessive mixing so that the biscuit doesn't get bad.
Gather the dough carefully onto pineapple cuts into the mold, leveling the surface with a spatula.
Hornea durante aproximadamente 40-45 minutos, o hasta que al insertar un palillo en el centro, este salga limpio.

Remove the biscuit from the oven and let it cool into the mold for a few minutes. Then put a big plate onto the mold and, while holding them together, turn around to crumble the biscuit onto the plate.
Let completely cool before serving. Can decorate with a little more pineapple cuts if you wish.

how-to-make-african-corn-fritters-comede.name: How To Make African Corn Fritters
how-to-make-african-corn-fritters-comede.original_name: Cómo hacer fritters de maíz africanos

ingredients.item: ½ cup of early maize flour
1 cdite of paprika or sweet peppermint

instructions: Procure the corn till you have a dense dough.
The mixture goes into a bowl and incorporates early maize flour.
Incorpora la sal, pimienta, paprika y el ajo en polvo.
Add the chopped onion and chili. Also add an egg.
Mezcla muy bien hasta que todo se integre perfectamente.
Warm up a frying pan with vegetable oil.
Meanwhile, you can form fritters with your hands or mold them with a spoon. You can give them pancakes or frisks.
Fry them up and about till they get crispy and dusk.
Retira y coloca en papel absorbente para que se escurran.
Serves and goes with tomato sauce or some hot dip. Enjoy!

how-to-make-baked-polenta-comedera.name: How To Make Baked Polenta
instructions: In a big pot, pour water and get out and let them boil. When she's breaking the herb, put the flame down at half low.
Add the polenta to the pot. Revels with a tablet of wood till a double start to form about 2 minutes.

He adds the rest of his polenta and keeps stirring occasionally for 10 minutes. When the polenta's texture is creamy. Add butter, oil, thyme, salt and pepper to your taste. Revolves to combine ingredients and removes from fire.
Warm up the oven at 180 ° C (350ºF).
In a slightly grown baking mold, pour the polenta mixture, add mozzarella grated cheese and put into the oven. Let's cook for 20 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Cut square pieces, serve and enjoy.

how-to-make-banana-pudding-step-by-step-.name: How To Make Banana pudding step by step
how-to-make-banana-pudding-step-by-step-.original_name: Cómo hacer budín de plátano paso a paso
instructions: It purifies the oven at 180 and 3.
Peel the bananas and put them in a bowl. With a foot, cut them up till it's as purée.
In a bowl, beat your eggs till they are sparkling.
It incorporates melted butter, Sugar, pint of salt, cinnamon and vanilla essence. Mix till everything's integrated and homogenous.
In another bowl, mix wheat flour with baking powder and bicarbonate. Toss this mixture.
Fold the liquid mixture into the banana purée.
It incorporates steamed flour from step to step with wrapped movements up to all well mixed.
Fold the mixture into a rectangular mold that should be english and pitted.
Hornea for 60 minutes or until a stick gets clear.
Once ready, remove from the oven and let cool. Unmold and cut and enjoy.

how-to-make-burgers-recipe-comedera.name: How To Make Burgers: Recipe
how-to-make-burgers-recipe-comedera.original_name: Cómo hacer hamburguesas caseras: receta fácil

ingredients.item: 1/2 kg de carne de ternera picada
1/2 kg de carne de cerdo picada

instructions: The first thing we will do will be to get a bowl or bowl of good size, so we can mix with it all the ingredients of our cheeseburger meat.
Luego, pelaremos los dientes de ajo, los trituraremos y los colocaremos en el bol.
To continue, we will wash the parsley well and scattering it. Then we'll get as thin as we can and we'll measure two tablespoons and we'll add them to the bowl.
The following will be to add the meat. As stated earlier, these cheeseburgers will be far more tasty if half of beef and half of pork are used.
Now let's add a touch of salt and another of pepper to taste (you can use 1 / 2 teaspoon coffee as a reference measure). If you like the cumin, you can also add a pint of ground cumin.
Finally, we will add an additional flavored touch with the four tablespoons of Worcestershire sauce. We'll finish with a tipstick of sweet peppermint.
We will soon mix all the ingredients with our hands and get more or less homogenous dough.

Then you have to form balls the size of a golf ball with this mix. To shape the meat, we will crush each of these balls until it remains circular and just under a finger's thickness (except if you want to make giant burgers, they will take a little more time to cook).

To cook the burgers, you'll need a big frying pan. Warm up an (very modest) jet of oil and make sure it cover the whole background. To achieve this, it will be sufficient to move the frying pan through the mango once the oil has been heated.
Once hot, place one or more pieces (depending on the size of the frying pan) and cook as required.

The thickness of each meat will have to be taken into account to estimate the cooking time. If you did them as I explained to you in this recipe cook 6 to 10 minutes (total), for a Red Center or a little baked burger. leave them a little more than 10 minutes to get well-cooked burgers (and that's highly best if you use pork).
Retira del calor y arma las hamburguesas inmediatamente.

how-to-make-chicken-stroganoff-in-no-tim.name: How To Make Chicken Stroganoff In No Time
how-to-make-chicken-stroganoff-in-no-tim.original_name: Cómo hacer strogonoff de pollo en poco tiempo

ingredients.item: 1.3 pounds (600 g) of chicken breast in pieces

instructions: He starts with his chicken with garlic and salt and pepper on both sides.
A frying pan with medium heat heats up the oil and puts the chicken. Press slightly with a scatula and cook for 4 minutes until well baked and slightly golden.
Fold up pieces of chicken and cook for another 2 minutes. Withdraw from the fire and put up a plate aside.
In the frying pan where you baked the chicken, add the butter and melt with medium-high heat. Add minced ion and cook for 1 minute. Add the musthrooms.
Cooking till the muscles are golden. Add the flour and cook for 1 minute sniring constantly.
Add half the stock while you're stirring. When the ingredients are integrated, add the missing stock.
Add sour cream and mustard. Revels till the ingredients are added.
Let them get cold. When the salsa weighs about 3 minutes, try and add salt or pepper if necessary.
Add the chicken with everything and the juices that were left on the plate.
Cooking at low heat for 1 minute and withdrawing from fire.
Serves and goes with salt or dough. Enjoy.

how-to-make-cream-cheese-stuffed-buns-st.name: How To Make Cream Cheese Stuffed Buns Step By Step
how-to-make-cream-cheese-stuffed-buns-st.original_name: Cómo hacer bollitos rellenos de queso crema paso a paso

ingredients.item: 3 tazas de harina de todo uso
100 gr de mantequilla sin sal a medio derretir

instructions: To start with the recipe, pour into a bowl tibia milk, 2 tablespoons of sugar, 2 tablespoons of flour and yeast. With a spatula, mix very well to integrate and later leave to stand for 15 minutes in a fresh atmosphere.
After that time, add the remaining flour, egg, sugar and butter into a big bowl. It also incorporates the fermented yeast mixture.
